calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Judge Gerald Ragan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Sarah Shyang-Feng Kung, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Feng Kung.
The Court further orders the gender changed from Female to Male.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-01-2005 Off Calendar
